title: history arc 06 input and overlays
summary: The development thread focuses on improving the picker overlays and dispatch correctness in the history arc 06, with key decisions including the introduction of a per-project pinned working set, a new H chord prefix family, and an =h filter. These changes enhance the picker's functionality and usability, particularly in managing complex calendar splits and pattern matching. The outcomes include improved dispatch accuracy and a more intuitive user experience through the implementation of labeled overlays and parallel patterns.
